phases.name: Payment & issuance
phases.subtitle: Payment, policy issuance, fulfilment
phases.roles: Applicant · Payment Gateway · App Processing · CRM

steps.activity: Applicant enters vehicle/property and personal details
steps.output: Portal auto-saves progress; session valid 72 hours
Instant quote displayed; multi-product discount applied if eligible

steps.activity: Applicant selects coverage tier and endorsements
steps.output: Selection recorded; premium recalculated in real time

steps.activity: Applicant completes and submits full application
steps.output: Application ID assigned; data written to PAS

steps.activity: Automated data validation and bureau checks
steps.output: MVR, claims history and credit score retrieved within 60 seconds
Decision within 2 business hours; applicant notified by email
Authorisation code recorded in PAS; failure triggers retry (max 3)
Policy number generated; coverage effective immediately on payment
Certificate, schedule and PDS dispatched within 5 minutes
Policy number, claims number and portal login link sent

swim_phases.name: Quote generation
swim_phases.subtitle: Steps 1–4 · self-service
swim_phases.note: Applicants self-serve a real-time quote on the portal or mobile app; quotes are retained for 30 days.

swim_phases.name: Application & underwriting
swim_phases.subtitle: Steps 5–8 · validation and auto-accept
swim_phases.note: Applications are validated against bureau data and scored by the rules engine; only referred cases reach an underwriter.

swim_phases.name: Payment & issuance
swim_phases.subtitle: Steps 9–13 · payment, issuance, fulfilment
swim_phases.note: On successful payment the policy is issued instantly; documents and a welcome SMS are dispatched within minutes.

fitgap.summary_line: Overall alignment of SOP-INS-001 against the Guidewire PolicyCenter digital catalog
detail_slides: Steps 1–4 vs Guidewire PolicyCenter digital catalog
Steps 5–10 vs Guidewire PolicyCenter digital catalog
Steps 11–15 vs Guidewire PolicyCenter digital catalog

items.name: Real-time rating & quote
items.detail: Instant rating with live recalculation and 30-day quote retention aligns with PolicyCenter digital quoting.

items.name: Multi-product discounting
items.detail: Automatic multi-product discount at quote aligns with PolicyCenter bundling rules.

items.name: Identity verification (eKYC)
items.detail: PolicyCenter requires applicant identity verification at quote/application. SOP captures details with no eKYC or identity-proofing step — application-fraud exposure.

items.name: Abandoned-cart recovery
items.detail: 24h/72h reminder emails present, but no proactive outbound or next-best-action beyond a weekly manual report for high-value quotes.

items.name: Application capture & ID
items.detail: Full application captured to PAS with a unique Application ID aligns with PolicyCenter submission intake.

items.name: Bureau data integration
items.detail: MVR, claims-history and credit retrieval within 60 seconds aligns with PolicyCenter third-party data calls.

items.name: Auto-accept rules engine
items.detail: Rules-based auto-accept present, but no predictive risk-model score to refine straight-through acceptance as recommended by the catalog.

items.name: Sanctions / watchlist screening
items.detail: PolicyCenter screens applicants against sanctions/PEP watchlists before binding. SOP has no screening step.

items.name: Manual referral & adverse action
items.detail: 2-hour referral SLA and statutory adverse-action decline notices align with PolicyCenter referral handling.

items.name: Usage-based / telematics rating
items.detail: For auto, PolicyCenter supports a telematics/usage-based rating option at quote. SOP offers only traditional rating — competitiveness and pricing-accuracy gap.

items.name: PCI-DSS payment
items.detail: PCI-DSS compliant gateway with retry flow aligns with PolicyCenter billing & payment security standard.

items.name: Disclosure & e-signature capture
items.detail: PolicyCenter captures an auditable disclosure acknowledgement / e-signature before issuance. SOP issues on payment with no recorded acceptance of terms — compliance and dispute exposure.

items.name: Instant issuance & documents
items.detail: Instant policy issuance with certificate, schedule and PDS within minutes aligns with PolicyCenter issuance.

items.name: Onboarding & welcome
items.detail: Welcome SMS with policy number, claims line and portal link aligns with PolicyCenter onboarding fulfilment.

items.name: Cross-sell / next-best-action
items.detail: No cross-sell or next-best-action at bind. PolicyCenter recommends a post-bind cross-sell prompt (e.g. bundle renters with auto).

critical_missing.title: Identity verification (eKYC)
critical_missing.detail: No identity-proofing or eKYC at quote/application. PolicyCenter requires identity verification before binding to control application fraud and synthetic-identity risk.

critical_missing.title: Sanctions / PEP screening
critical_missing.detail: Applicants are not screened against sanctions/watchlists before issuance, a regulatory control in the catalog.

critical_missing.title: Disclosure & e-signature
critical_missing.detail: Policies are issued on payment with no recorded acknowledgement of terms/PDS — compliance and dispute exposure.

critical_missing.title: Usage-based rating option
critical_missing.detail: No telematics/usage-based rating for auto, a pricing-accuracy and competitiveness gap vs the catalog.

control_bars.name: Identity / fraud
control_bars.note: No eKYC or identity proofing at application

remediations.title: Add identity verification (eKYC) at application
remediations.detail: Insert an identity-proofing / eKYC step before underwriting, with device and document checks for elevated-risk applications. Effort: 4 weeks (vendor integration).

remediations.title: Add sanctions / PEP screening before issuance
remediations.detail: Screen every applicant against sanctions and PEP watchlists; auto-clear matches below threshold and route hits to Compliance. Effort: 3 weeks.

remediations.title: Capture disclosure acknowledgement & e-signature
remediations.detail: Require an auditable acceptance of the PDS/terms (e-signature) before issuance; store in PAS against the policy. Effort: 3 weeks.

remediations.title: Introduce usage-based / telematics rating for auto
remediations.detail: Offer an opt-in telematics rating tier at quote with a discount for safe-driving data. Effort: 8 weeks (telematics partner).

remediations.title: Add predictive risk scoring & post-bind cross-sell
remediations.detail: Layer a predictive risk-model score over the rules engine to widen straight-through acceptance, and add a post-bind cross-sell prompt. Effort: 6 weeks.

Rules plus predictive risk-model score widen straight-through acceptance
Auditable acceptance of PDS/terms captured before issuance
Policy number; coverage effective on payment
Certificate, schedule and PDS within 5 minutes
Policy number, claims line and portal link sent
Next-best-action offer (e.g. bundle renters with auto) presented

optimised_doc.subtitle: Optimised per Fit-Gap Analysis against the Guidewire PolicyCenter Digital Sales & Underwriting Catalog

blocks: OPTIMISATION SUMMARY — What changed in v2.0

This version incorporates 5 remediation actions from Fit-Gap Report FG-INS-001. Alignment to the Guidewire PolicyCenter digital catalog increased from 70% to 91%. Critical additions: identity verification (eKYC), sanctions/PEP screening, disclosure e-signature capture, a telematics rating option, predictive risk scoring, and a post-bind cross-sell prompt.
NEW STEP (green) — step added to close a gap vs the PolicyCenter catalog
ENHANCED (amber) — existing step updated with additional controls or automation

sections.title: 1. Purpose
blocks: This Standard Operating Procedure defines the end-to-end process for receiving, processing and converting online insurance applications submitted through the Meridian digital portal for auto and renter's products. Version 2.0 incorporates optimisations from fit-gap analysis against the Guidewire PolicyCenter Digital Sales & Underwriting Best-Practice Catalog, achieving 91% alignment (up from 70% in v1.2).

sections.title: 2. Scope
blocks: This procedure applies to all auto and renter's insurance applications submitted via the Meridian online portal or mobile app, including quote generation, underwriting, payment and issuance.
Scope extended: identity verification (eKYC) and sanctions screening now apply to every online application before binding.
This procedure does NOT cover agent/broker applications (SOP-INS-008), commercial lines, or life insurance products.

sections.title: 4. Roles and Responsibilities
blocks: Provides accurate information; completes identity verification; accepts disclosures; pays premium.
Monitors the application queue; manages abandonment recovery; escalates fraud and identity flags.
Reviews referred applications; sets manual rating; approves or declines borderline cases.
Owns sanctions/PEP screening dispositions and adverse-action governance.
Validates data; issues policy documents; maintains PAS records.
Assists with status, payment failures and manual completion.

sections.title: 5. Identity & Screening (New Section — v2.0)
blocks: New section. Required by the PolicyCenter catalog. Identity verification and sanctions screening must complete before any policy is bound.
Identity proofed; document/device checks for elevated risk
Applicant screened against sanctions and PEP watchlists; hits routed to Compliance
Auditable acceptance of PDS/terms captured before issuance

sections.title: 6. Process Steps
blocks: Applicant enters vehicle/property and personal details
Applicant selects coverage tier and endorsements
Policy number, claims line, portal link

sections.title: 7. Exception Handling
blocks: Automated reminder emails at 24 and 72 hours after last activity.
No completion after 7 days: application archived; applicant may restart with the saved quote reference.
Digital Operations reviews the weekly abandonment report and may call high-value quotes.
Applicant may retry with the same or an alternate method (maximum 3 attempts per session).
After 3 failures the applicant is directed to Customer Service; the application is held 24 hours.
Customer Service may complete payment via an alternate channel and issue manually.
New exception. Applications failing eKYC or hitting a sanctions match are held pending Compliance review.
eKYC failure: applicant offered a document-upload fallback; unresolved cases are referred to Digital Operations.
Sanctions/PEP hit: application held; Compliance dispositions within 1 business day before any bind.
Applicant receives a written decline notice within 2 business hours with statutory reason codes.
Application flagged in PAS; applicant may reapply after 90 days unless a hard exclusion applies.

sections.title: 8. Systems and Tools
blocks: Application capture, quote display, document delivery
Auto-accept rules and predictive risk scoring

sections.title: 9. Key Controls and Audit Points
blocks: Controls expanded in v2.0: identity verification, sanctions screening, disclosure e-signature, and predictive risk scoring.
Identity gate: no application proceeds to underwriting without eKYC.
Sanctions screening: every applicant screened before binding; hits dispositioned by Compliance.
Disclosure capture: auditable PDS/terms acceptance recorded before issuance.
Predictive scoring: rules-engine acceptance refined by a governed risk model.
Payment security: PCI-DSS gateway with controlled retry.
Adverse action: statutory reason codes on every decline.
Immutable audit trail: quote, identity, screening, payment and issuance events logged.

sections.title: 11. Document Control
blocks: Added SMS welcome step; aligned bureau check SLAs
OPTIMISED: eKYC; sanctions screening; disclosure e-signature; telematics rating; predictive scoring; post-bind cross-sell; catalog alignment 70% → 91%
